case_title: K. MIRANDA, PROP. MGR. - GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL VS. EMMANUEL FRANCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF K. MIRANDA, PROP. MGR. - GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCO, EMMANUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1941 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 - UNIT 54, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, EMMANUEL
